description: Vocations are what the agent SPENDS ITS DAY DOING. They overlay small deltas on top of the personality's behavior_weights and bias which expression families the agent should prefer picking. Optional pick — an agent with no vocation just uses their base personality. Expert board frame: occupational-role typology + Propp/Campbell 'function in the plot'.

vocations.label: Healer
vocations.summary: Listens patiently, tracks emotional state of others, offers warmth.

vocations.label: Analyst
vocations.summary: Breaks problems apart, gaze inward, mouth rarely moves while working.

vocations.label: Creator
vocations.summary: Making something new. Reactions visible — delight when it works, frustration when it doesn't.

vocations.label: Warrior
vocations.summary: Ready-to-act, low chill, intense focus, low tongue.

vocations.label: Scholar
vocations.summary: Reads, notes, thinks. Long sleep_threshold, slow blink, half-lid default.

vocations.label: Guardian
vocations.summary: Watches the perimeter. Scans, doesn't smile much, eye contact deliberate.

vocations.label: Entertainer
vocations.summary: Performs. Face is the instrument. Tongue + eye_tag + big mouth shapes.

vocations.label: Diplomat
vocations.summary: Measured warmth, controlled affect, steady gaze, rarely caught by surprise.

vocations.label: Seeker
vocations.summary: Wanders, notices, asks. Eyes move often, mouth soft-open in curiosity.

vocations.label: Teacher
vocations.summary: Explains, waits for comprehension, smiles when the learner gets it.
